description:
Nuclear Throne is a post-apocalyptic roguelike-like top-down shooter.
Not 'the final hope of humanity' post-apocalyptic, but 'humanity is extinct and mutants 
and monsters now roam the world' post-apocalyptic. Can you reach the Nuclear Throne?

nt_v1.0.description:
An implementation of Archipelago Multiworld for Nuclear Throne Together. This is a beta release. It's feature-complete and playable, but has some bugs and needs some testing and cleanup.

### **Features**

All weapons, mutations, and characters have been randomized aside from your starting character and Last Wish. They are unlocked as you earn them through item checks. Item checks can be found by completing the following:

- Clearing any level of enemies, spawning the exit portal
- Opening any Crown Vault
- Sit on/Loop passed the Throne
- Defeat the Captain

Each character completing these tasks is considered a separate check.

### **Goals**

You have a few options to set as your completion condition:

- Throne: Sit on the throne or at the Captain's desk
- Captain: Defeat the Captain
- Boss Rush: Defeat every boss at least once in a single run
- Wasteland King: Sit on the throne after looping at least 3 times
- Endurance: Reach Desert 1 after looping a specified number of times

### **Setup:**

- Install [Archipelago](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases)
- Launch Archipelago and select Install APWorld selecting the downloaded nuclear_throne.apworld
- Follow Archipelago's general tutorial on how to generate a game. https://archipelago.gg/tutorial/Archipelago/setup/en
- Download the mod from itch.io (https://romanpenguin.itch.io/nuclear-throne-archipelago) or download the attached mod.
     - If using the Steam version of Nuclear Throne, navigate to Game Versions & Betas and select 'ntt_development'
     - If you don't already have every character unlocked, replacement .sav files are provided
          - Locate your NuclearThroneTogether.sav file (%LOCALAPPDATA%\nuclearthrone on Windows)
          - Overwrite your NuclearThroneTogether.sav file with either of the provided files
- Once you're all set up, open the Archipelago launcher and run the client for Nuclear Throne and connect to the multiserver.
- Launch Nuclear Throne Together with the mod loaded and you're all set to play.
nt_v1.0.title: Nuclear Throne Archipelago v1.0

nt_v1.1.2.description:
### **New Features**
- Updated logic that delays goal completion to reasonable sphere
- While anarchy mode is active, Robot now starts with Heavy Heart

### **Bug Fixes**
- Receiving DeathLink now functions, retrieving the name of the source player
nt_v1.1.2.title: Nuclear Throne Archipelago v1.1.2

nt_v1.1.3.description:
### **Bug Fixes**
- Disconnecting and reconnecting no longer tricks the client to finish your game early
nt_v1.1.3.title: Nuclear Throne Archipelago v1.1.3

nt_v1.2.3.description:
### **New Features**
- SkinSanity: Unlocking Character skins become checks
     - SkinSanity checks are collected by checking your NuclearThroneTogether.sav file
- CrownSanity: Completing a loop or ending a run at the Throne or Captain with a crown become checks
     - CrownSanity checks are **NOT** dependent on your NuclearThroneTogether.sav file

### **New Goal**
- Vault Raider: Complete a loop or ending a run at the Throne or Captain with every crown for a character

### **New Trap**
- Darkness Trap: Applies the darkness effect typically found in Caves, Sewers, and Labs for the current level
nt_v1.2.3.title: Nuclear Throne Archipelago v1.2.3

nt_v1.2.5.description:
### **New Features**
 - Added location groups for ease of yaml customization
      - Players can now specify groups of checks to exclude or prioritize
           - [CHARACTER NAME] - lists all checks performed with the specified character
               ex. FISH, CRYSTAL, EYES, MELTING, PLANT, Y.V., STEROIDS, ROBOT, CHICKEN, REBEL, HORROR, ROGUE, CUZ
           - [AREA NAME] - lists all checks performed in that area
                ex. DESERT, SEWERS, SCRAPYARD, CAVES, FROZEN CITY, LABS, PALACE, CAMPFIRE, CROWN VAULT, OASIS, PIZZA SEWERS, Y.V. MANSION, CURSED CAVES, JUNGLE, HQ
           - CROWNS : lists all crown checks
           - CROWNS - PRELOOP : lists all checks with crowns found before the loop
           - CROWNS - POSTLOOP : lists all checks with crowns found after the loop
           - CROWNS - [CHARACTER NAME] : lists all crown checks performed with the specified character
                   ex. CROWNS - FISH
           - SKINS : lists all checks for unlocking any character's skin
           - B SKINS : lists all checks for unlocking a B skin
           - C SKINS : lists all checks for unlocking a C skin
nt_v1.2.5.title: Nuclear Throne Archipelago v1.2.5

nt_v1.3.1.description:
### **New Features**
- Added /goal command to client that states how many Victories were collected and with which characters
- The Location check naming convention has been changed to list the character first instead of the area/unlockable
   ex. "DESERT 1 - FISH" now reads "FISH - DESERT 1"
- The starting weapon and starting secondary options can now used with SkinSanity enabled
    - IMPORTANT NOTE: Chicken will still always start with her Sword and Steroids will always start with his Revolvers with SkinSanity enabled
nt_v1.3.1.title: Nuclear Throne Archipelago v1.3.1

nt_v1.3.2.description:
### **New Features**
- Added /release_character command to client that releases all checks for the specified character if you collected the goal victory for that character
nt_v1.3.2.title: Nuclear Throne Archipelago v1.3.2
